description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Tests that runs on every push. The workflow has two jobs: windows-qbs and windows-qmake. The windows-qbs job runs on a Windows 2019 or 2016 environment with a matrix of Qt versions and architectures, installing Qt and Qbs, setting up Qbs, and running qbs build. The windows-qmake job also runs on a Windows 2019 environment with a matrix of Qt versions and architectures, installing Qt, adding msbuild to PATH, checking out the code, and running qmake, nmake, and nmake check.
